message:
feat(bubbletea-macros): Implement #[state] attribute for render-triggering fields (charmed_rust-9e9)

Add state tracking infrastructure to the derive macro:

- Add StateFieldArgs struct for parsing #[state] attribute options
- Add state.rs module for state snapshot generation
- Generate state snapshot struct with tracked fields
- Generate __snapshot_state() and __state_changed() methods
- Support #[state(skip)] to exclude fields from tracking
- Support #[state(eq = "fn")] for custom equality functions
- Support #[state(debug)] for change logging
- Add From<darling::Error> for MacroError
- Add trybuild tests for state attribute variations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
